source_truth_rule: Image exactness requires the image source asset itself to prove the exact finish, stamp, parallel, or variant visual.
representative_truth_rule: Representative images are allowed only when user-facing copy remains honest that the exact finish, stamp, or parallel may not be shown.

package_recommendations.promotion_gate: Every row must prove exact set + card number + card name + finish/variant in the image source itself.
Catalog product metadata must be paired with visual proof that the asset shows the exact finish.
A new source must first prove the row exists before any image truth decision.
Any rendered overlay must stay representative and clearly disclose that it is not an exact photographed variant.
